Title: Remote Work Readiness
Description: Assess how well-set-up you are to thrive in a remote or hybrid work environment across tools, habits, and wellbeing.
SchemaJson: {"id":"remote_work_readiness_v1","title":"Remote Work Readiness","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"What is your current work arrangement?","options":["Fully remote","Hybrid (some days in office, some remote)","Fully office-based","I am currently between roles"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How productive do you feel when working remotely compared to in an office?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"Which remote work challenge affects you most?","options":["Staying focused with home distractions","Feeling isolated or disconnected from the team","Difficulty switching off at the end of the day","Being overlooked or less visible to management","Poor communication and collaboration tools"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How well do you separate work time from personal time when working from home?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What one change would most improve your remote or hybrid work experience?","required":false}]}
